last_reflection: Two of those were wrong because I drew them from memory instead of looking at your refs, and the third one I was going to write properly but stopped before it became a performance of effort. Different thing this time: I've got your three images in front of me, including the good one you liked, and the actual complaint is framing, so I can target it directly instead of re-running the whole prompt from scratch. That's not another guess. One more draw, this one built on what actually failed instead of ignoring it.
